prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **911S 2.4L Type 901/06** (2,341cc, 9:1 compression, 190 HP @ 6,500 RPM) with a **Weber 46 IDA3C** triple-throat carburetor setup, replacing the stock 914/6's **Type 901/36** (2.0L, 110 HP). Retain the original 914/6 magnesium crankcase but upgrade to **Mahle forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)** and **Porsche 911S forged connecting rods** for durability under increased power.

Full **Rennsport-spec suspension overhaul** using **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers** (adjustable damping, 30mm drop) paired with **Porsche 911 ST-spec 22mm front and 19mm rear anti-roll bars** from **Elephant Racing**. Replace stock bushings with **Delrin spherical bearings** (front control arms, rear trailing arms) and **polyurethane subframe mounts** from **Pelican Parts** to eliminate flex.

Lightweight **911 RSR-inspired braking system** with **Brembo 4-piston calipers (330mm front, 300mm rear)** using **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Pagid RSL29 rotors** (drilled/slotted). Replace the stock 914/6 master cylinder with a **Tilton 7/8" dual-circuit unit** and braided stainless steel lines from **Goodridge**. Add a **Porsche 935-style brake cooling duct kit** (custom fabricated) to prevent fade during endurance use.
estetica: Full **Rennsport replica widebody conversion** using **Elephant Racing’s 914/6 GT-spec fiberglass fenders** (3.5" wider front, 4" wider rear) with **custom aluminum inner fender liners** to clear the 911S suspension. Paint in **Porsche Viper Green (L96K)** with **Gulf Oil-inspired livery** (matte black hood, white racing stripes, and **Porsche Motorsport decals** from **Sticker City**).

Custom **911 ST-style front bumper** with **integrated Hella 160 fog lights** and a **carbon fiber splitter** from **914World**. Rear bumper replaced with a **fiberglass 914/6 GT replica** (no overriders) and a **carbon fiber ducktail spoiler** (hand-laid, 3K twill) from **Aero Composites**. Side skirts are **custom aluminum** (riveted, 1.5mm thick) with **integrated LED turn signals** from **United Pacific**.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a **911 RSR-style roll cage** (TIG-welded, 4130 chromoly) from **Autopower Industries**, **Sparco Pro 2000 seats** (fixed-back, FIA-approved) with **Schroth 6-point harnesses**, and a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm, suede). Dash replaced with a **custom aluminum panel** housing **Stack analog gauges** (3.5" tach, oil temp, oil pressure, fuel level) and a **Motec C125 dash logger**. Floor pans are **aluminum honeycomb** (0.8mm) with **Dynamat Extreme sound deadening** beneath.
